'''''Termagant''''' was a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] in [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]'s fleet.

In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], ''Termagant'' accompanied [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']] to [[the Graveyard]] to destroy [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and a convoy led by [[Mirax Terrik Horn|Mirax Terrik]] which was carrying [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] to fight the [[Krytos virus]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

The two ships and their [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] destroyed most of the convoy, but the [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] that ''Termagant'' destroyed were actually [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] disguised as Rogue Squadron. [[Kirtan Loor]] had sent the false Rogue Squadron to destroy the convoy on his own initiative, but [[Ysanne Isard]] leaked the convoy's route to Zsinj.

By the time Rogue Squadron arrived, ''Iron Fist'' had left the area, so the squadron attacked the Strike Cruiser. The Rogues destroyed some of the Imperial [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], and their [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] blew the cruiser completely in half. ''Termagant''{{'s}} surviving TIEs were captured by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces.
